were present. In response to this question, Md. Minister (Higher and Technical Education)
Pursuant to a reply given in the Legislative Council House on d. 24.02.2026, a
It has been decided to appoint a high-level inquiry committee of members. In accordance with the
The appointment of the committee was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Almuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology, Sapgaon, Ta. Shahapur,
To investigate the complaints received against G. Thane, one of the following
A high-level inquiry committee of members is being appointed.
Powers and functions of the Committee.-
a) Committee against the institution Government, Fee Regulatory Authority, Technical Education
Directorate, Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education as well as University of Mumbai, Mumbai.
It will investigate the complaints received.
b) To examine and hear complaints received by the Committee against the institution.
You will have the right to take.
a) To order the Committee to attend to the inquiry of all persons concerned.
There will be a right.
d) The committee will call the complainants and collect the evidence they have and their
Will do an in-depth study.
e) After the inquiry of the said Committee, its report along with the recommendations is submitted to the Government within three months.
will be submitted.
The committee should submit the inquiry report with recommendations to the government within three months.
Necessary office support to the committee will be provided by the Directorate of Technical Education.
